title: anisomeles xerophila
intro: Anisomeles xerophila, also known as the dry-land anisomeles, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Anisomeles xerophila are attributed to its essential oils, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Anisomeles xerophila can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
